import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('sample_bulk_upload.xlsx'\)
for sheet_name in wb.sheetnames:
    ws = wb[sheet_name]
    print\(f'Sheet: {sheet_name}'\)
    for i, row in enumerate\(ws.iter_rows\(values_only=True\)\):
        print\(f'  Row {i+1}: {row}'\)
        if i >= 5:
            print\('  ...'\)
            break
    print\(\)
